reviews.name: Bernd
reviews.text: Good. Recommended. You can tell the difference from cheaper products. The device works and does what it's supposed to - vacuum. Powerful pump. Overall feels very well made.

reviews.name: Matthias
reviews.text: Very good vacuum. Top quality.

reviews.name: Andreas
reviews.text: Overall very high-quality and robust impression. Vacuum performance TOP!

reviews.name: Josef
reviews.text: Top device!!

reviews.name: Tim
reviews.text: Super for the hunt. Creates a proper vacuum.

reviews.name: Markus
reviews.text: The V300 Premium X is an absolute pro device. Very easy to use, very good workmanship. The price-performance ratio is also fine. Would definitely recommend it and buy it again. Quality and workmanship very good. Price-performance top.

reviews.name: Marcel
reviews.text: Pro tool. Top workmanship!

reviews.name: Edmund
reviews.text: Clear purchase recommendation. Excellent and beautiful. Works perfectly. Others can do cheap. I regret nothing.

reviews.name: Patrik
reviews.text: Top!!! Recommendations 5 *****. I've had the device for many years and it has shown no signs of failure so far, works excellently, top workmanship. It's not exactly a bargain... but worth every cent. I can really recommend it!!!

reviews.name: Detlef
reviews.text: Very good. Fast delivery and good handling. Very good.

reviews.name: Andreja K.
reviews.title: Quality as expected
reviews.text: Quality of the product is as expected for the price offered.

reviews.name: Daniel G.
reviews.title: Quality pays off!
reviews.text: I can only agree with the previous reviewers: Top workmanship and extremely easy handling. This applies to both the V.300 Black device and the vacuum bags and rolls.

reviews.name: Martha T.
reviews.title: The vacuum sealer belongs in every household
reviews.text: The quality and workmanship are professional-grade. The device is worth its price.

reviews.name: Christian M.
reviews.title: Top device 1A
reviews.text: Bin sehr zufrieden 👍🏻

reviews.name: Rüdiger H.
reviews.title: Super
reviews.text: Top quality. Intuitive operation.

reviews.name: Steffen K.
reviews.title: Amazing device!
reviews.text: The V.300 Black is my third vacuum sealer - the first two were from discounters. No comparison. The Lava device feels built for eternity. Press down once and the magnetic closure holds, everything else happens automatically.

reviews.name: Bastian M.
reviews.title: Professional work
reviews.text: A device that holds what it promises. Very easy to use and great result.

reviews.name: Simone M.
reviews.title: Very good product
reviews.text: Very good device, the quality justifies the price...

reviews.name: Stephanie G.
reviews.title: Pleasant handling and good instructions
reviews.text: Highly satisfied. The instructions are great: understandable and easy to implement. The preparation tips helped us. Moist or dry food could be perfectly vacuum-sealed with the right preparation.

reviews.name: Peter K.
reviews.title: High quality in great design packaging
reviews.text: Great design meets best functionality

reviews.name: Markus J.
reviews.text: Surely this is the best quality vacuum sealer I've ever used. It's fast, easy to use and seems to be very reliable. I am absolutely satisfied!

reviews.name: Dreispross
reviews.text: The V.300 Black is really easy to use. It is relatively heavy, but can be stored in a utility room or a spacious kitchen. You can use it to neatly vacuum seal very large cuts of meat as well as very small cuts. Besides game, you can also use it to vacuum seal normal meat, cheese, bread, mushrooms and even screws.

reviews.name: Anonymous
reviews.text: Vacuum sealing and hunting belong together. The V.300 Black vacuum sealer processed fallow deer, wild boar, wild duck breasts, game sausages, venison from deer, sow and stag perfectly.

reviews.name: Niclas
reviews.text: The vacuum sealer works excellently, never lets me down, and functions just as described. It's simply an outstanding product.

reviews.name: Tony M.
reviews.text: Initial impression is that this is a brilliant vacuum sealing machine. Very easy to use and to maintain.

reviews.name: Boris
reviews.text: Just came back from my 1.5 weeks fishing trip. Vacuumed heaps of fish and the V.300 White worked excellent.

reviews.name: David
reviews.text: After I received my V.300 White, I started to vacuum seal every day. It's so simple and intuitive. I am in love with and I can strongly recommend.

reviews.name: Anonymous
reviews.text: The vacuum sealer has a great finish, I love the colour. It fits perfectly with my kitchen esthetic.

reviews.name: Helmut H.
reviews.text: Know of no better. Have had the same one for over 10 years and now bought one for the club to vacuum seal smoked fish. Completely satisfied.

reviews.name: Daniela F.
reviews.text: Do not regret buying it. Device works cleanly and reliably. Very fast and you can process two small bags at once perfectly.

reviews.name: Josef W.
reviews.text: An expensive but super good, high-quality device that's perfect even for commercial use!!! This machine works great and is worth the high price if you value lasting quality!

reviews.name: Holger G.
reviews.text: Would buy it again anytime. Great product, excellent workmanship.

reviews.name: Falk D.
reviews.text: Everything perfect! I can only recommend this device. The quality and workmanship are high-end.

reviews.name: Alexander T.
reviews.text: I love my new vacuum sealer. Great product with excellent quality. Well done!

reviews.name: Michaela R.
reviews.text: Perfect for me. Since I vacuum a lot, this purchase was worth it — I can even pack two bags side by side simultaneously.

reviews.name: Laura Z.
reviews.text: Completely satisfied. Fast delivery, great product, happy to buy again!

reviews.name: Falk D.
reviews.text: Everything perfect! I can only recommend this device. The quality and workmanship are high-end.

reviews.name: James M.
reviews.title: Good one
reviews.text: Finally, a solution on how to vacuum multiple bags simultaneously. Powerful pump and clean weld seams. What more could one ask for?

reviews.name: Marcel R.
reviews.title: All great
reviews.text: The device is constantly in use in our fishing club and, thanks to its width, it is also able to vacuum several fish at the same time next to each other. We are very satisfied and are happy to recommend this vacuum machine.

reviews.name: Alexander T.
reviews.text: I love my new vacuum sealer. Great product with excellent quality. Well done!

reviews.name: Michaela R.
reviews.text: Perfect for me. Since I vacuum a lot, this purchase was worth it — I can even pack two bags side by side simultaneously.

reviews.name: Alisa K.
reviews.title: Mega!!!
reviews.text: Every day, almost hundreds of bags are sealed with this device in our hotel, and at the same time. Handling is child's play thanks to the clear control terminal. The bags are absolutely tight and the vacuum also holds reliably. You don't want to imagine how much food we would have to throw in the trash without a vacuum sealer.

reviews.name: Viliam M.
reviews.text: Those bags are superior to any other on the market. Always been the best choice.

reviews.name: Pedro G.
reviews.text: Fast shipping and good quality. The price of the items was fair, but shipping makes it too expensive. One needs to make a big order to compensate for the shipping. Quality up to standard.

reviews.name: Le Thomas J.
reviews.text: Your basic products are of excellent quality, as are the consumables. Undisputedly a must in the vacuum machine sector. Excellent value for money, bags of very good quality, no bad sealing. Top quality.

reviews.name: Michael E.
reviews.text: Good strong bags. Have used them for many years along with my vacuum machine. Easy to use with anything you need to freeze or keep sealed for a long time. Excellent for keeping out freezer burn.

reviews.name: Dileep S.
reviews.text: Excellent vacuum packaging. My go-to for all my vacuum packaging. Been using these products for more than 10 years now, and that says it all.

reviews.text: Not used yet, very robust impression. Not used yet, but they are obviously very robust.

reviews.name: Karlheinz W.
reviews.text: Simply brilliant.

reviews.name: Alfred M.
reviews.text: Very good workmanship. Can also be used very well for other containers with a smooth rim.

reviews.name: Alfred M.
reviews.text: Great piece. Can also be used well on other containers.

reviews.name: Christian B.
reviews.text: I will keep ordering this item again. A very practical piece.

reviews.name: Jörg S.
reviews.text: Stable lids... work. Very stable. Fit several sizes of bowls for me. Great.

reviews.name: Richard G.
reviews.text: Top product. Good and sturdy workmanship.

reviews.name: Jörg D.
reviews.text: Very good!!! Very good!!!

reviews.name: Ian M.
reviews.text: Ideal for a busy kitchen. Really useful.

reviews.name: Martin S.
reviews.text: Works very well. Very good.

reviews.name: Marco M.
reviews.text: Perfect and close excellently. Very good lids and perfect for our needs at Pulverei-Geschmackshandwerker.de.

reviews.name: Viliam M.
reviews.text: Those bags are superior to any other on the market. Always been the best choice.

reviews.name: Pedro G.
reviews.text: Fast shipping and good quality. The price of the items was fair, but shipping makes it too expensive. One needs to make a big order to compensate for the shipping. Quality up to standard.

reviews.name: Le Thomas J.
reviews.text: Your basic products are of excellent quality, as are the consumables. Undisputedly a must in the vacuum machine sector. Excellent value for money, bags of very good quality, no bad sealing. Top quality.

reviews.name: Michael E.
reviews.text: Good strong bags. Have used them for many years along with my vacuum machine. Easy to use with anything you need to freeze or keep sealed for a long time. Excellent for keeping out freezer burn.

reviews.name: Dileep S.
reviews.text: Excellent vacuum packaging. My go-to for all my vacuum packaging. Been using these products for more than 10 years now, and that says it all.

reviews.name: Mathias J.
reviews.text: Excellent shop. Good product and quality very good. Prices maybe a bit too high by 20-25%.

reviews.name: Viliam M.
reviews.text: The best vacuum bags you can buy. Also reasonably priced compared to others.

reviews.name: Antonio Fernando Lopes N.
reviews.text: I will buy it again. Very good service, quick delivery, and a high-quality product. Recommended!

reviews.name: Mārtiņš T.
reviews.text: Good offer. Good price/performance.

reviews.name: Kai R.
reviews.text: Absolutely great product!
